title: syzygium zeylanicum var. lineare
intro: Syzygium zeylanicum var. lineare, also known as Ceylonese water apple or linear water apple, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to Sri Lanka and is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Syzygium zeylanicum var. lineare can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves.
